title: TruthEvent
description: Unified truth event schema for actual observations, predictions, approvals, and execution results in DeerFlow governance system.

truth_event_id.description: UUID -- globally unique identifier for this truth event

context_id.description: Associated ContextEnvelope.context_id (R240-4). Links this truth to a specific orchestration context.

request_id.description: Associated OrchestrationRequest.requestId from M01. Links to the originating request.

governance_trace_id.description: ContextEnvelope.governance_trace_id for cross-system lineage tracing. NOT currently propagated in outcome_records (R240-6 gap).

source_system.description: System that produced this truth event: queue_consumer, governance_bridge, learning_system, watchdog, rtcm, ...

truth_type.description: Semantic type of this truth event. Determines how actual/predicted/confidence fields are interpreted.

truth_track.description: The domain/track this truth belongs to. Determines which governance learning system consumes it.

subject_type.description: Type of entity this truth is about.

subject_id.description: Identifier of the subject: candidate_id, tool_name, asset_id, doctrine_id, etc.

actual_value.description: Actual observed/measured value. Interpretation depends on truth_type: binary 1.0/0.0 for actual_outcome; 0.0-1.0 quality signal for asset_quality_signal; accept/reject/needs_revision string for approval_decision/rtcm_verdict.

predicted_value.description: Predicted/expected value before execution. Range 0.0-1.0. Null means no prediction was made.

confidence.description: Confidence level for predicted_outcome truth_type. Not used for actual_outcome or approval_decision.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence artifacts: governance_state.json lines, artifact paths, log files, governance_trace_id chain.

producer.description: Function/class that produced this event: queue_consumer.write_governance_outcome, governance_bridge.record_outcome, learning_system.evolve, etc.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this truth event was recorded.

related_state_id.description: Associated StateEvent.state_event_id if this truth event triggered a state transition.
